summary: Iteration 11: Verified SHOW-THINKING feature and SPEED regression. Backend: 3/3 new tests pass — gpt-oss:20b emits multiple thinking SSE events followed by tokens/done; AUTO simple prompt '17*24' returns 408 with validator_model='heuristic' (fast path, no deep validation LLM call); web-mode retains real validator/sources. Frontend: thinking-panel appears above the answer for reasoning prompt in Manual mode with gpt-oss:20b, toggle-thinking collapses/expands correctly, final answer renders below, zero console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: harness/pipeline.py: gating deep validation on evidence_provided or category=='legal' is a sensible speed win; consider also gating on message length or a low-confidence heuristic if drafter self-verify confidence is low so uncertain non-grounded answers still get a second opinion.

ChatMessage.jsx thinking-panel: default-open state on newly streaming assistant messages could be considered so users see reasoning live (currently opens/closes fine but initial state should be verified matches product intent).

verified_behaviors.thinking_stream_backend: manual gpt-oss:20b prompt emits >=1 (typically many) {type:'thinking'} events before {type:'token'} tokens and a final {type:'done'}. Combined thinking text non-trivial (>10 chars).
verified_behaviors.speed_regression: AUTO 'What is 17 times 24?' completes in ~few seconds; done.validator_model=='heuristic'; answer contains '408'.
verified_behaviors.grounded_validation_kept: AUTO use_web=true 'capital of France' completes; returns validator_model (real or heuristic if web found nothing) plus content — spec-allowed either real validator or sources.
verified_behaviors.frontend_thinking_ui: Manual mode + gpt-oss:20b: data-testid='thinking-panel' rendered with data-testid='toggle-thinking'; toggle collapses text (82 chars visible → 9) and re-expands. verify-badge (final answer completion) appears; body contains '0.05' (correct ball price). No console or page errors.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 backend suite is /app/backend/tests/test_thinking_speed.py. Requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported when running pytest (frontend/.env is source of truth: https://rag-verify-ai.preview.emergentagent.com). model-option testid contains a colon; use CSS attribute selector '[data-testid="model-option-gpt-oss:20b"]' rather than get_by_test_id. Ollama is rate-limited; keep single-prompt timeouts >=90s and web-mode 120s+.
